servers.name: RCQ (default)
servers.description: Default backend operated by the RCQ maintainer. AGPL-3.0 source at github.com/rcq-messenger/rcq-server-ref. Hosted in Frankfurt.

servers.name: RCQ federation demo (is2)
servers.description: A second independent RCQ island, run by the maintainer for trying cross-island federation during beta. Register here, then message users on the flagship (api.rcq.app) from the web client at chat.rcq.app — add them as uin@api.rcq.app. Demo instance: account keys and data live only on this server, no push notifications. Hosted in Frankfurt.
